is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7443441246422453272","book_info":{"abstract":"沐辰胎穿僵尸世界，成为茅山小师叔，学道两年半没能入门！
　　师父临终前，让一眉师兄代师授徒，学道六年还是什么都没学会！
　　直到一次偶然的机会，沐辰接触到邪术，觉醒【邪术一键满级系统】，只要是邪术就可以一键提升到满级！
　　由此，沐辰做了个违背祖宗的决定！
要给修道界，亿点点震撼！
　　……
　　九叔有些懵。
　　师父临终让他代师授徒。
　　没想到小师弟教啥啥不会，学啥啥不行！
　　正当九叔觉得死后无颜面见师父，人生一片灰败时。
　　小师弟突然给他大大的‘惊喜’……
　　“至臻炼鬼术…化境养尸诀…”
　　“足可开山立派的蛊术、降头术…”
　　“掌教别揍我啦…小师弟，你自己说，为兄当真是这么教你的？！”
　　“你自己看看这合理吗？！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/825965cb78ab58fbc18b3e0afbde21e3","author":"门前烟竹","author_id":"","book_id":"7443441246422453272","book_name":"我家师弟超可爱，绝不会养女鬼！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#581818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7443441425846370840","read_count":"20639","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"923876"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"421","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,九叔,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4c0c38482d1a604a54220565040f9dd8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393261&x-signature=Unh4tAB5gaSe9WUmtmKTmp%2Bd8PU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1173901320926206","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"14"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035421A7F9DBFDD54572BA68A7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_dura
